small.name: Typical Municipal Garage
small.notes: 200 stalls; 3 levels; single helix; surface retail wrap possible

medium.name: 1111 Lincoln Road
medium.notes: Herzog & de Meuron; 300 stalls; mixed-use with retail, event space; open-air

large.name: LAX Economy Parking Structure
large.notes: 10,000+ stalls; multi-level; shuttle connection; revenue control; heavy automation

space_library.name: Entry / Exit Lanes
notes: Gate equipment; ticket dispensers or LPR cameras; 12 ft lane width min; queuing length 2-3 cars; signage and wayfinding

space_library.name: Parking Floor (Typical Level)
notes: 325-375 SF/stall gross (incl. drive aisles); 8.5x18 ft stall; 60 ft bay double-loaded; 10.5 ft floor-to-floor min; 7 ft clear min; turn radius 25 ft; one-way 12 ft aisle, two-way 24 ft aisle

space_library.name: Vehicle Ramps / Helixes
notes: 5-6.67% max slope; 12 ft width per lane; helix vs split-level vs speed ramp; transition slopes at entries; anti-skid surface

space_library.name: Stair / Elevator Core (Pedestrian)
notes: Pressurized stair towers; glass-backed for CPTED visibility; elevator for ADA; color-coded levels; wayfinding

space_library.name: Pedestrian Lobby / Skybridge Landing
notes: Connection to adjacent buildings; street-level pedestrian access; weather-protected

space_library.name: Revenue Control / Cashier Booth
notes: Pay-on-foot stations replacing booths; LPR replacing gates; climate-controlled booth; cash handling security

space_library.name: Management / Security Office
notes: CCTV monitoring; PARCS system management; incident response; near ground-level entry

space_library.name: EV Charging Zone
notes: 5-20% of stalls trending; Level 2 (240V) and DCFC; dedicated electrical panel; conduit to all future stalls; ventilation per code

space_library.name: Restrooms
notes: Typically ground level only; near pedestrian lobby; vandal-resistant fixtures

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: CO/NO2 monitoring and exhaust fans for enclosed garages; open-air structures need minimal HVAC; fire pump room

space_library.name: Parking Space (Standard)
notes: 8.5 ft wide x 19 ft deep standard stall (162 sf); ADA stalls 11-16 ft wide; striping and wheel stops; one-way aisle 12 ft, two-way 24 ft

space_library.name: Parking Space (ADA Accessible)
notes: 12 ft wide stall + 5 ft access aisle (shared between two stalls); van-accessible: 11 ft stall + 5 ft aisle, 8 ft 2 in vertical clearance; locate nearest accessible route; 1 per 25 stalls up to 100, then 1 per 50

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: EV charging panel capacity; emergency lighting; exit signage; revenue control power

plan_archetypes.notes: Double-loaded for drive aisles; racetrack for express ramp systems
